metrolink: Events are taking place across Greater Manchester this weekend; services may be busier than usual. To plan your journey visit www.tfgm.com
headlines: Only half of US datacenter capacity planned for 2026 is actually  under construction
Smartphone market to shrink 15 percent this year due to memory crisis

crew_quote: "21 degrees and partly cloudy, eh? Perfect curry weather! Let's celebrate with a takeaway instead of worrying about all those datacenters that aren't even built yet!"
